description: Chaos erupts as sirens sound for evacuation due to the imminent threat posed by Project Helius powering up. Daisy, Coulson, and Simmons quickly move to secure Sousa and prevent interference. May and Elena scramble amidst the crowd, with both of them reeling from their failed confrontation with the Chronicom. The Zephyr team realizes that Helius must be stopped immediately or the consequences will be catastrophic.

transcript.line: Attention. Attention. Mandatory evacuation procedures...
Sorry, really.
Let me out of here right now!
I'm a fan!
He really is!
We're the good guys, I swear!
Get out! Get out!
Let's go. Come on. Go! It's okay. Get out. Move! Move! Move! Hey! You!
Help! Help!
It's okay. We'll get you help. Go.
Go! Come on, come on. You!
What's happening?
You! That way! May! That's the Chronicom! May! May! Hey.
I can't... I can't breathe...
It's okay.
I can't... I can't breathe.
Calm down! Calm down!
I gotta get... I gotta get out.
Put your mask on, May. I'll get you out.
Okay. I got to get...
Are you okay?
I don't know...
What happened?
I don't know! I've never felt that. That's never happened before.
May, calm down. Calm down. It's okay. May, whatever it is, you can tell me.
Does it look like I want to talk about it?
Okay, well, let's go. Maybe we can catch her.
And what the hell happened to you, huh? How come you weren't able to catch her when she was running away?
Do I look like I want to talk about it? Come on.
Helius is powering up. They need to evacuate.
It might be too late for that.
Maybe we can power it down remotely.
What the hell is this?
Easy. Just... take it easy.
No. What kind of commies are you?
I can explain. I'd just rather not.
Move! Move! Come on! Come on! Keep going! Keep going! All the way out! Let's go!
